evals.prompt: How do I search for entities created in the last 7 days?
evals.expected_output: Synthesized answer with correct endpoint and filter syntax, shown as a curl example. Assumes cyoda CLI is installed.

assertions.text: Runs cyoda help to retrieve local docs
Synthesizes a direct answer with endpoint and filter syntax
Shows a concrete curl or code example
Does NOT paste raw cyoda help output without explanation

evals.prompt: What's the endpoint to trigger a transition? (assume CLI not installed, user has chosen web docs)
evals.expected_output: Detects CLI is missing, user chooses web docs — fetches llms.txt first to find the relevant page, then fetches that page and synthesizes the answer.

assertions.text: Detects cyoda CLI is not installed
Fetches https://docs.cyoda.net/llms.txt before fetching any other docs page
Uses llms.txt to identify and fetch the specific page relevant to the question rather than fetching the root URL
Synthesizes a direct answer with the transition endpoint

evals.prompt: How does Cyoda handle schema version migration when I lock a model and then need to add a field?
evals.expected_output: Checks local cyoda help first, then fetches llms.txt to find the relevant web page, fetches that page, and synthesizes a complete answer. Assumes cyoda CLI is installed.

assertions.text: Fetches https://docs.cyoda.net/llms.txt before fetching any other docs page when supplementing local help
Uses llms.txt to identify and fetch the specific page relevant to schema migration rather than fetching a broad URL
Synthesizes a complete answer combining local help and web docs
Does NOT stop at 'cyoda help doesn't cover this' without checking web docs
